root_cause.headline: 11 West-tier-2 substations share IED firmware v4.1.2 which triggers a false trip on phase imbalance over 4.5% — a threshold tuned for East seasonal load, not West
root_cause.detail: Every West tier-2 substation carrying firmware v4.1.2 shows avg phase imbalance of 5.1% under normal West load conditions — above the 4.5% trip threshold. East substations run v3.9.4 and show avg phase imbalance of 3.8%, safely below the same threshold. The threshold was calibrated on East seasonal load profiles during the rollout. Adjusting the firmware threshold to 6.0% for West substations eliminates the false trips without replacing hardware.
root_cause.affected_cohort: West service territory, tier-2 substations on IED firmware v4.1.2

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. PUC filing window closes without the answer.
narrative: VP files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority A.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — days after the PUC window closes.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four gold marts by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Grid ops team cannot isolate root cause before the PUC filing deadline.
PUC submission carries a note: reliability data pending. $2.7M penalty risk remains.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four gold upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a Q1-2026 slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_outage_by_substation_tier_quarter.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 9 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
VP presents root-cause finding to PUC 15.5 hours ahead of the filing deadline.

hero.label: Root cause identified 15.5 hours before the PUC filing window closes
hero.note: From VP question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The grid operations team now knows the IED firmware threshold was calibrated on East seasonal load. The fix is a threshold adjustment on 11 substations, not a hardware replacement. $2.7M PUC penalty exposure resolved.
